query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A grayscale abstract image featuring sweeping diagonal and curved forms created by motion, with bright streaks of light arcing across darker gray regions and translucent layered planes suggesting folded or flowing material.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily motion-blurred grayscale abstract photograph with intentional soft focus, sweeping diagonal streaks of light arcing across darker muted tones, and translucent layered planes that dissolve into indistinct flowing forms, conveying ethereal movement through its washed-out palette and lack of recognizable subject matter.
